highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.0 bumps to Skia milestone 119 and dramatically widens the Linux and Windows platform matrix.
highlights_body: This release adds LoongArch64, RISC-V 64, Alpine and Windows ARM builds, brings Direct3D on Windows, expands Metal to tvOS, and refreshes libpng and vulkanmemoryallocator. It also lands several long-standing SKCanvas, SKColorFilter and .NET Framework fixes.

bullets.detail: Bumps the bundled Skia to milestone 119, picking up the upstream renderer and text improvements.
Implements SkCanvas::SaveLayerRec so consumers can save layers with a backdrop filter, image filter and flags in one call.
Adds the SKColorFilter types that had been missing from the managed surface.
The GRBackendRenderTarget Metal APIs are now available on every Apple platform.
Corrects the SKImage.FromPicture implementation so pictures render as expected.
Fixes a regression that broke projects using .NET Framework or Mono with packages.config.
Restores acceptable frame times when rendering with Metal in the iOS Simulator.
Fixes .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues and moves the earlier WASM workaround into SkiaSharp itself so consumers don't have to.
Adds LoongArch64 and RISC-V 64 native builds, extends the cross-compiler to Alpine, and generally widens Linux support.
Enables GL on Windows ARM, fixes ARM build targets, and compiles Skia with Direct3D on Windows.
Also rolls in the never-released 3.118.0 preview line — the milestone 117 and 118 bumps, the fontconfig update, WinUI SDK version pinning, and the Blazor/WASM base-path fix.
Updates libpng, vulkanmemoryallocator, freetype2, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and HarfBuzz.

contributor_summaries.kasperk81: Vulkan Memory Allocator update, RISC-V 64 build, Linux test fixes, and the Alpine cross-compiler extension.
contributor_summaries.Kation: Compiled Skia with Direct3D on Windows.
contributor_summaries.kkwpsv: Fixed an incorrect native call in the bindings.
contributor_summaries.spouliot: Made the GRBackendRenderTarget Metal APIs available on every Apple platform.
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Fixed a regression affecting .NET Framework and Mono projects using packages.config.
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed iOS Simulator Metal rendering performance.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 opened the 3.119.0 line, widening the Linux and Windows platform matrix, adding SaveLayerRec, and rolling in the milestone 117/118 catch-up work.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 collected the Blazor/WASM fixes, the Metal APIs everywhere, and the freetype/libexpat/libjpeg-turbo refreshes.

harfbuzz_summary: Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.1.1 and picks up the LoongArch64, RISC-V 64, Alpine and Windows ARM native builds for the HarfBuzzSharp binding.
